name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: At 2118 E Cesar E Chavez Ave in Los Angeles, CA, Ria Money Transfer provides check cashing and money transfer services, open 8AM-7PM daily.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer at 2118 E Cesar E Chavez Avenue serves Los Angeles residents throughout East LA and surrounding neighborhoods. Located in Los Angeles, CA, this standalone branch is open seven days a week from 8AM to 7PM. The location offers convenient parking and sits on a high-traffic street, making it accessible for your check cashing and money transfer needs.

This Los Angeles branch provides check cashing services for personal and payroll checks, as well as international money transfers. For information about transfer fees, exchange rates, or to check on a payment in progress, call +1 855-355-2141 during business hours. The staff can help you with documentation and process your transaction quickly.

When visiting this location in Los Angeles, bring your government-issued ID and either the check to cash or transfer details. The extended hours—8AM to 7PM, seven days a week—accommodate most schedules, and transactions typically complete within minutes. This East LA branch provides reliable check cashing and money transfer services for your local financial needs.
address: 2118 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

company_info.headquarters: 2118 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

pros: Extensive physical agent network with 24-hour availability at 7-Eleven locations
Multiple sending methods including WhatsApp, online, mobile app, and in-person options
Five different receive methods (bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM withdrawal)
Serves 190+ countries across all major continents with localized service options
Integrated bill payment services at most agent locations
Community-embedded agents including specialty check cashers and local businesses in immigrant neighborhoods
Mobile app availability for on-the-go transfers without location visits
cons: No published exchange rates, fees, or transfer timeframes on website—customers must visit locations or call
Service quality and hours vary significantly across agent locations (some open 6 AM-5:30 PM, others 24 hours)
Limited regulatory and compliance information disclosed publicly on website
Heavy dependence on third-party agent networks may result in inconsistent customer service experiences
Website lacks detailed cost comparison tools or transparency about what 'fast' delivery actually means
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family in Latin America, Asia, Africa, or Eastern Europe
Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer in-person cash transactions over digital-only services
Customers in urban areas with dense agent networks seeking convenient, nearby pickup locations
Multilingual populations in major U.S. cities with established immigrant communities
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for unbanked immigrants and expatriates who need in-person money transfer services to family abroad and value physical convenience over digital-only platforms. The primary caveat is the complete lack of published pricing and fee information on their website—customers cannot comparison-shop or understand true costs before committing to a transfer, making it essential to contact locations directly or visit in person for cost details.
services: In-person money transfer at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at 2118 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA. Check cashing and international money transfers open 8AM–7PM daily.
